'''Palme du Tigre''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a wide variety of terrain, which included [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]], [[Desert/Legends|deserts]], plains, [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]], and [[Ocean/Legends|seas]].<ref name="Backstab" />

Its indigenous [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]], the [[Palmien]]s, had a pre-spatial level of technology.<ref name="Backstab" />

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] trained numerous non-[[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] recruits on the planet. The final test of their training was to commit [[Speciecide|genocide]] of the native population.<ref name="Backstab" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Palme du Tigre" is French for "Tiger's Palm".
